subject: other off the records
body:
Reminder: check with JAck regarding salad spoon the
girl who alleged forced sex, then said she came back
hundreds of times... the other "victims", a word we
won't use, not only came back, but recruited their
friends.  the cars that were rented were for over age
drivers..., LEt's try to lead her to cathy rundel, as
opposed to giving it to her..
